Hardware Component File

N_B02E_HVAC_UDS_20151120

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_B02E_HVAC_UDS_20151120_20151120T090956.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 744
Receive ID 764
Functional Addr 29
Functional Name HVAC

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "410604",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]
